description_long: This object depicts a highly stylized adult human figure with exaggeratedly elongated arms and lower body, giving it a surreal and distorted appearance. The figure has long, straight hair and a slender torso, with the arms stretched horizontally far beyond normal proportions. The lower body extends into a long, tapering form, merging the legs into a single, skirt-like structure. The face is human-like, with visible eyes and mouth, and the upper body is bare at the shoulders. The overall form is smooth and continuous, with no visible joints or separations between limbs and torso.
description: A surreal, elongated adult human figure with extremely stretched arms and a tapering lower body, featuring long hair and a smooth, continuous form.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, long hair, bare shoulders, and the extreme horizontal stretch of the arms.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the profile of the face, the long hair, and the dramatic tapering of the lower body.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizes the width of the outstretched arms and the narrowness of the lower body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile and the elongated arm and lower body.
attribute_clothing_type: long, form-fitting dress or skirt with bare shoulders
